name: Retail Brand — EU Customer Services & EDI Processes
documentation: ArchiMate 3 model of a retail brand's EU customer service operations covering the five core B2B processes: Replenishment Order Management, Despatch Advice & Shipment Tracking, Invoice & eInvoicing, Sales Reporting (sell-through), and Inventory Reporting. Standards covered: UN/EDIFACT (ORDERS, ORDRSP, DESADV, INVOIC, SLSRPT, INVRPT), Peppol / EN 16931 eInvoicing, GS1 (GTIN, GLN), and REST/XML APIs. Based on a typical fashion/apparel brand with wholesale customers across EU countries.

elements.name: Retail Brand (EU Operations)
elements.documentation: The fashion / apparel brand operating across EU markets. Owns the product range, manages wholesale accounts, and is responsible for order fulfilment, invoicing, and compliance with EU trade and tax regulations.

elements.name: EU Customer Service Teams
elements.documentation: Country-level customer service teams across EU (e.g. NL, DE, FR, UK, IT, ES). Responsible for order intake, query handling, despatch tracking, and invoice dispute resolution for wholesale accounts.

elements.name: Wholesale Customer / Retailer
elements.documentation: Department stores, independent retailers, and key accounts that purchase from the brand on a wholesale basis. They place replenishment orders, receive shipments, process invoices, and report sell-through and inventory data back to the brand.

properties.value: Department store, independent retailer, key account

elements.name: 3PL / Logistics Partner
elements.documentation: Third-party logistics provider responsible for warehouse operations, pick/pack, and carrier management. Generates despatch advice (ASN) and shipment tracking events.

properties.value: Warehousing, pick/pack, carrier management, ASN generation

elements.name: Finance & Accounts Receivable
elements.documentation: Internal finance team responsible for invoice generation, credit management, VAT compliance, and eInvoicing under EU Directive 2014/55/EU and national transpositions. Handles credit notes and dispute resolution.

elements.name: Customer Service Representative
elements.documentation: Handles inbound order queries, order entry, delivery status checks, returns, and complaint resolution. First point of contact for wholesale accounts.

elements.name: EDI Coordinator
elements.documentation: Manages EDI trading partner onboarding, message monitoring, error handling, and reconciliation of EDIFACT/API transactions. Liaises between CS teams and the IT/EDI platform team.

properties.value: EDIFACT D96A, GS1 XML, REST APIs

elements.name: Order Manager
elements.documentation: Responsible for order validation, allocation, and fulfilment planning. Coordinates between customer service, warehouse, and the 3PL to ensure on-time delivery.

elements.name: Finance Manager / Credit Controller
elements.documentation: Manages invoice issuance, credit limits, payment terms, and VAT compliance per country. Responsible for eInvoicing compliance (Peppol, EN 16931) where mandated.

elements.name: Logistics Coordinator
elements.documentation: Coordinates with the 3PL on despatch planning, carrier selection, and shipment tracking. Ensures accurate and timely DESADV messages are sent to customers.

elements.name: 1. Replenishment Order Management
elements.documentation: End-to-end process for receiving, validating, and confirming wholesale replenishment orders from customers. Covers EDI ORDERS message receipt (or portal/API entry), inventory allocation, and ORDRSP (order response) issuance. Supports regular seasonal replenishment as well as open-to-buy (OTB) top-up orders.

properties.value: Customer PO via EDI, portal, or e-mail

elements.name: 2. Despatch Advice & Shipment Tracking
elements.documentation: Process for generating and sending Advance Shipment Notifications (ASN / DESADV) to customers once goods are picked and despatched by the 3PL. Includes carton-level GS1-128 label data, carrier tracking references, and expected delivery dates. Customer sends back RECADV (receiving advice) upon goods receipt.

elements.name: 3. Invoice Processing & eInvoicing
elements.documentation: Invoicing process covering generation of commercial invoices after despatch, VAT calculation per country, credit note issuance, and compliance with EU eInvoicing regulations. Invoices are sent via EDIFACT INVOIC message and/or Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 (EN 16931) for countries requiring structured electronic invoicing.

properties.value: Peppol BIS Billing 3.0, EN 16931, UBL 2.1 / CII
Per-country EU VAT rules, OSS where applicable

elements.name: 4. Sales Reporting (Sell-Through)
elements.documentation: Process for collecting and processing sell-through (POS) data from wholesale customers. Customers submit weekly or monthly sales reports (SLSRPT or flat-file equivalent) showing units sold per SKU/location. Data feeds brand merchandising, forecasting, and replenishment planning.

properties.value: Sell-through analysis, OTB planning, brand KPIs

elements.name: 5. Inventory Reporting
elements.documentation: Process for collecting stock-on-hand data from customers and own distribution centres. Customers submit INVRPT messages (or portal uploads) covering stock levels per SKU/location. Used for inventory visibility, VMI (Vendor Managed Inventory), and replenishment triggers.

elements.name: Order Management Service
elements.documentation: External-facing service provided to wholesale customers enabling order placement, order status tracking, and order confirmation.

elements.name: Logistics & Fulfilment Service
elements.documentation: Service covering shipment notification, carrier tracking, and proof-of-delivery to wholesale customers.

elements.name: eInvoicing Service
elements.documentation: Compliant invoice delivery service supporting EDIFACT INVOIC and Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 for EU markets requiring structured electronic invoicing.

elements.name: Sales & Inventory Reporting Service
elements.documentation: Service that receives, validates, and processes sell-through (SLSRPT) and inventory (INVRPT) data from wholesale customers, making it available to merchandising and planning teams.

elements.name: Purchase Order (ORDERS D96A)
elements.documentation: Formal purchase order from a wholesale customer to the brand. Contains buyer GLN, seller GLN, line items with GTIN, ordered quantities, requested delivery date, and price agreements. Transmitted via EDIFACT ORDERS D96A or equivalent REST payload.

properties.value: EDIFACT ORDERS D96A / GS1 XML PurchaseOrder

elements.name: Order Response (ORDRSP)
elements.documentation: Brand's response to a customer purchase order, confirming accepted lines, back-orders, substitutions, or cancellations. Includes confirmed delivery date and quantities per line.

elements.name: Despatch Advice / ASN (DESADV)
elements.documentation: Advance Shipment Notification sent by the brand/3PL to the customer prior to delivery. Contains SSCC carton labels, GTIN/qty per carton, carrier and tracking reference, and expected delivery date.

properties.value: EDIFACT DESADV D96A / GS1 XML DespatchAdvice

elements.name: Invoice (INVOIC / Peppol BIS)
elements.documentation: Commercial invoice issued after despatch. Includes line-level GTIN, quantities, unit prices, VAT breakdown per country, and payment terms. Transmitted via EDIFACT INVOIC or Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 (UBL 2.1 / CII) depending on customer/country capability.

properties.value: EDIFACT INVOIC D96A, Peppol BIS Billing 3.0, EN 16931
Per EU country; OSS for cross-border where applicable

elements.name: Credit Note
elements.documentation: Document issued to reverse or partially offset an invoice. Generated for returns, shortages, pricing disputes, or damaged goods. Transmitted via EDIFACT CREADV or Peppol BIS Credit Note 3.0.

properties.value: EDIFACT CREADV / Peppol BIS Credit Note 3.0

elements.name: Sales Report (SLSRPT)
elements.documentation: Sell-through report submitted by the wholesale customer showing units sold per SKU, per store location, for a given period. Used by the brand for sell-through analytics, OTB, and replenishment.

elements.name: Inventory Report (INVRPT)
elements.documentation: Stock-on-hand report from customer locations or the brand's own DC. Shows available inventory per GTIN per location. Feeds VMI and automated replenishment.

properties.value: GTIN x Location (GLN) x Inventory type

elements.name: ERP System (SAP S/4HANA)
elements.documentation: Core enterprise resource planning system managing order-to-cash (O2C), financial accounting, and inventory management. Acts as the system of record for orders, invoices, customer master, and product master (including GTIN mapping).

elements.name: EDI / B2B Gateway Platform
elements.documentation: Middleware platform handling EDIFACT message translation, routing, and trading partner management. Converts between internal ERP formats and external EDIFACT messages. Manages AS2, SFTP, and VAN connectivity. Examples: Seeburger BIS, OpenText TN, MuleSoft B2B.

properties.value: EDIFACT D96A, GS1 XML, ANSI X12
Seeburger BIS, OpenText TN, MuleSoft B2B, Cleo

elements.name: Order Management System (OMS)
elements.documentation: Manages the full order lifecycle: order capture, allocation, release to warehouse, backorder management, and delivery tracking. May be a standalone OMS (e.g. Manhattan, Blue Yonder) or embedded in ERP.

properties.value: Manhattan OMS, Blue Yonder, SAP EWM

elements.name: Warehouse Management System (WMS)
elements.documentation: Manages 3PL warehouse operations: inbound receipts, storage, pick/pack, and despatch. Generates SSCC labels and triggers DESADV message creation on shipment confirmation.

properties.value: Triggers DESADV on ship-confirm; receives ORDERS for picking

elements.name: eInvoicing Platform (Peppol AP)
elements.documentation: Certified Peppol Access Point enabling compliant eInvoicing across the EU Peppol network. Converts SAP invoice output to Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 (UBL 2.1 / CII) and transmits via the 4-corner Peppol model. Also supports country-specific mandates (IT SDI, FR Chorus Pro, NL SBdH).

properties.value: Peppol BIS Billing 3.0, EN 16931, UBL 2.1, CII D16B

elements.name: B2B Customer Self-Service Portal
elements.documentation: Web-based portal allowing wholesale customers to place orders, track shipments, view invoices, download sales reports, and upload inventory/sales data. Provides an alternative to EDI for smaller customers without EDI capability.

properties.value: Order entry, shipment tracking, invoice view/download, data upload

elements.name: BI & Reporting Application
elements.documentation: Business intelligence platform consolidating sales reporting (SLSRPT), inventory (INVRPT), and operational data for merchandising, planning, and management reporting. Examples: SAP Analytics Cloud, Power BI, Tableau.

properties.value: SAP Analytics Cloud, Power BI, Tableau

elements.name: Order Processing Service
elements.documentation: Application service providing order creation, validation, inventory allocation, and order response generation. Exposed via EDI (ORDERS/ORDRSP) and REST API.

elements.name: Invoice Generation Service
elements.documentation: Generates structured invoices and credit notes from ERP billing documents. Outputs EDIFACT INVOIC, Peppol BIS Billing 3.0, or PDF depending on customer capability.

elements.name: Inventory Management Service
elements.documentation: Manages real-time inventory availability across DCs and in-transit stock. Provides inventory data to OMS for allocation and publishes INVRPT to trading partners.

elements.name: Report Distribution Service
elements.documentation: Collects, validates, and distributes SLSRPT and INVRPT data from trading partners to BI and planning systems. Handles format normalisation across EDI, CSV, and API sources.

elements.name: EDI Translation & Routing Service
elements.documentation: Translates between internal application data formats and EDIFACT/GS1 XML messages. Routes inbound and outbound messages between trading partners and back-end systems. Provides acknowledgement (CONTRL) handling and error alerting.

properties.value: ORDERS, ORDRSP, DESADV, RECADV, INVOIC, CREADV, SLSRPT, INVRPT, CONTRL

elements.name: Product Master Data (GTIN / GS1)
elements.documentation: Canonical product data including GTIN-13/GTIN-14, product descriptions, size/colour variants, EAN barcodes, and GPC (Global Product Classification). Maintained in ERP and syndicated to EDI platform and portal.

properties.value: GS1 GTIN, GDSN (Global Data Synchronisation Network)

elements.name: Customer Master Data (GLN)
elements.documentation: Trading partner data including GLN (Global Location Number) for buyer, ship-to, and bill-to locations, EDI partner IDs, Peppol participant IDs, and payment terms per customer.

elements.name: Order & Fulfilment Data
elements.documentation: Transactional data covering purchase orders, order responses, despatch advices, receiving advices, and shipment tracking events. Retained as the source of truth for order-to-delivery performance.

elements.name: Financial & Invoice Data
elements.documentation: Invoice records, credit notes, VAT amounts per country, payment status, and open items. Used for accounts receivable management and statutory reporting.

elements.name: ERP Application Server
elements.documentation: On-premise or cloud-hosted server (or RISE with SAP) running the ERP application. Central processing node for order-to-cash and financial accounting.

elements.name: EDI Gateway Server
elements.documentation: Dedicated server or cloud-hosted EDI platform instance managing trading partner communications over AS2, SFTP, and HTTPS. Provides message queuing, retry, and audit logging.

elements.name: Peppol Access Point
elements.documentation: Certified Peppol Access Point node registered in the Peppol SML/SMP. Handles four-corner message exchange for eInvoicing across the EU Peppol network.

elements.name: Cloud Infrastructure (IaaS / PaaS)
elements.documentation: Cloud hosting environment (AWS, Azure, or GCP) for portal, BI, and integration middleware components. Provides scalability, high availability, and EU data residency compliance.

elements.name: Database Cluster
elements.documentation: High-availability database cluster storing transactional order, invoice, and reporting data. Provides persistence for ERP, OMS, and reporting applications.

elements.name: Integration Middleware / ESB
elements.documentation: Enterprise Service Bus or iPaaS layer orchestrating message flows between ERP, EDI platform, WMS, and OMS. Handles protocol transformation, data mapping, and error handling. Examples: MuleSoft, Dell Boomi, Azure Integration Services.

properties.value: MuleSoft Anypoint, Dell Boomi, Azure Integration Services, SAP CPI

elements.name: AS2 / SFTP Communication Software
elements.documentation: Software layer implementing AS2 (Applicability Statement 2) and SFTP protocols for secure B2B file exchange with trading partners. Provides encryption, digital signatures, and MDN acknowledgements.

elements.name: Value-Added Network (VAN)
elements.documentation: Third-party EDI network providing store-and-forward messaging, trading partner connectivity, and message archiving for customers that do not support direct AS2 connectivity. Examples: GXS/OpenText, SPS Commerce, Crossroads.

properties.value: OpenText GXS, SPS Commerce, Crossroads, BRNETS

elements.name: EDI Transport Service
elements.documentation: Low-level transport service for secure EDIFACT message exchange over AS2 and SFTP. Ensures delivery, acknowledgement (MDN/CONTRL), and audit trail.

elements.name: Peppol Network Service
elements.documentation: Peppol four-corner transport service enabling structured eInvoice delivery to any Peppol-connected receiver across EU. Uses PINT / BIS Billing 3.0 message format over AS4 protocol.

elements.name: REST API Gateway Service
elements.documentation: API gateway exposing RESTful endpoints for order submission, order status, inventory query, and reporting data exchange. Supports OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect for customer authentication.

elements.name: EDIFACT ORDERS / ORDRSP Message
elements.documentation: EDIFACT D96A ORDERS (purchase order) and ORDRSP (order response) message files. Structured per GS1/EAN.COM guidelines for retail. Contains UNH/UNT envelope, BGM, DTM, NAD (GLN), LIN (GTIN), QTY, PRI segments.

elements.name: EDIFACT DESADV Message
elements.documentation: EDIFACT D96A DESADV (despatch advice / ASN) message file. Contains shipment header, packing hierarchy (CPS), item data with GTIN and SSCC carton references, and carrier/tracking information.

properties.value: EDIFACT D96A DESADV; GS1 SSCC, GS1-128 labels

elements.name: EDIFACT INVOIC / Peppol BIS Invoice
elements.documentation: Invoice message transmitted as EDIFACT D96A INVOIC or Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 (UBL 2.1 / CII D16B). Contains invoice header, VAT summary, line items with GTIN, quantities, prices, and payment instructions.

properties.value: EDIFACT INVOIC D96A, Peppol BIS Billing 3.0, EN 16931, UBL 2.1

elements.name: EDIFACT SLSRPT Message
elements.documentation: EDIFACT D96A SLSRPT (sales report) message. Contains reporting period, location (GLN), and line-level sold quantities per GTIN. Submitted by the wholesale customer to the brand.

elements.name: EDIFACT INVRPT Message
elements.documentation: EDIFACT D96A INVRPT (inventory report) message. Contains stock-on-hand quantities per GTIN per location (GLN), inventory type (available, on-order, in-transit), and reporting date.

relationships.documentation: CS teams fulfil the Customer Service Representative role.
EDI Coordinators are part of the EU CS organisation.
Brand operations staff fill the Order Manager role.
Finance team fills Finance Manager / Credit Controller role.
3PL staff fulfil the Logistics Coordinator role.
CS Reps handle order intake and confirmation.
CS Reps track and communicate despatch status.
EDI Coordinators manage SLSRPT ingestion and validation.
EDI Coordinators manage INVRPT ingestion and validation.
Finance Manager owns the invoicing and eInvoicing process.
Order Manager oversees order allocation and fulfilment.
Logistics Coordinator manages 3PL despatch and ASN generation.

relationships.name: triggers
relationships.documentation: A confirmed replenishment order triggers the despatch and shipment process.

relationships.name: triggers
relationships.documentation: Goods despatch triggers invoice generation (invoice follows shipment).

relationships.name: submits SLSRPT
relationships.documentation: Customer submits weekly/monthly sell-through data (SLSRPT) to the brand.

relationships.name: submits INVRPT
relationships.documentation: Customer submits inventory stock-on-hand data (INVRPT) to the brand.

relationships.name: places ORDERS
relationships.documentation: Customer places replenishment purchase orders via EDI or portal.

relationships.name: provides shipment data
relationships.documentation: 3PL generates DESADV on ship-confirm and provides carrier tracking.
Order process reads inbound Purchase Order.
Order process writes Order Response (ORDRSP).
Despatch process writes and reads Despatch Advice / ASN.
Invoice process writes commercial invoice.
Invoice process writes credit notes for returns/disputes.
Sales reporting process reads inbound SLSRPT data.
Inventory reporting process reads inbound INVRPT data.
Order process realises the Order Management Service.
Despatch process realises the Logistics & Fulfilment Service.
Invoice process realises the eInvoicing Service.
Sales reporting process realises the Reporting Service.
Inventory reporting process realises the Reporting Service.
OMS order processing service supports the business order management service.
Invoice generation service supports the eInvoicing service.
Report distribution service supports sales & inventory reporting service.
EDI translation service supports order management process (ORDERS/ORDRSP).
EDI translation service supports despatch advice process (DESADV/RECADV).
EDI translation service supports sales reporting process (SLSRPT).
EDI translation service supports inventory reporting process (INVRPT).

relationships.name: self-service
relationships.documentation: B2B portal provides self-service order, invoice, and reporting access to wholesale customers.
ERP (SAP SD) realises order processing service.
ERP (SAP FI) realises invoice generation service.
ERP (SAP MM/WM) realises inventory management service.
EDI/B2B gateway platform realises EDI translation & routing service.
BI platform realises report distribution service.
Peppol AP realises invoice generation for structured eInvoicing.
OMS realises order processing for allocation and lifecycle management.
ERP reads and maintains product master (GTIN).
ERP reads and maintains customer master (GLN).
ERP reads and writes order & fulfilment data.
ERP reads and writes financial & invoice data.
EDI platform reads product master for GTIN mapping.
EDI platform reads customer master for GLN/partner ID routing.
Portal reads order & fulfilment data for customer self-service.
BI platform reads order data for sell-through and fulfilment analytics.
EDI transport (AS2/SFTP) enables EDI translation & routing service.
Peppol network service enables structured eInvoice delivery.
REST API gateway enables API-based order submission and status.
ERP server hosts the ERP application.
EDI gateway server hosts the B2B gateway platform.
Peppol AP node hosts the eInvoicing platform.
Cloud IaaS hosts the B2B customer portal.
Cloud IaaS/PaaS hosts the BI & reporting application.
Cloud IaaS hosts the Order Management System.
ESB/middleware orchestrates message flows into and out of the EDI platform.
ESB/middleware connects ERP to EDI and OMS integration flows.
AS2/SFTP software realises the EDI transport service.
VAN realises the EDI transport service for partners without direct AS2.
Database cluster persists order & fulfilment data.
Database cluster persists financial & invoice data.

relationships.name: carries
relationships.documentation: EDIFACT ORDERS message is the technical carrier of the Purchase Order document.

relationships.name: carries
relationships.documentation: EDIFACT ORDRSP message is the technical carrier of the Order Response.

relationships.name: carries
relationships.documentation: EDIFACT DESADV message is the technical carrier of the Despatch Advice.

relationships.name: carries
relationships.documentation: EDIFACT INVOIC / Peppol BIS is the technical carrier of the Invoice.

relationships.name: carries
relationships.documentation: EDIFACT SLSRPT message is the technical carrier of the Sales Report.

relationships.name: carries
relationships.documentation: EDIFACT INVRPT message is the technical carrier of the Inventory Report.
